title: Morgan Stanley Enters Bitcoin World With Low-Cost ETF
description: On Wednesday, April 8, 2026, Morgan Stanley announced the launch of the Morgan Stanley Bitcoin Trust ETP (MSBT). As Morgan Stanley notes, the launch of MSBT marks the first time a U.S. bank-affiliated asset manager is offering a crypto ETP.  Key Takeaways Morgan Stanley has made their debut in the world of spot bitcoin ETFs [...]The post Morgan Stanley Enters Bitcoin World With Low-Cost ETF appeared first on ETF Trends.

title: Bitcoin jumps to three-week high on U.S.-Iran ceasefire plan
description: The original crypto coin has been stuck between roughly US$60,000 and US$75,000 since the war began in late February

title: Iran Demands Bitcoin and Crypto for Strait of Hormuz Toll Payments
description: Gas prices and price of bitcoin could get a little more entangled.

title: Crypto Option Income ETFs Post March Distributions
description: Amplify’s crypto option income ETFs declared March distributions ranging from 27.9% to 50.52% annualized. The funds write weekly covered calls on crypto ETPs rather than holding Bitcoin, Ethereum, Solana or XRP directly. Two funds write calls on entire portfolios for maximum income, while four use more conservative strategies. Amplify ETFs declared March income distributions for [...]The post Crypto Option Income ETFs Post March Distributions appeared first on ETF Trends.
